notification.title: 🚨 System Alert: Critical Synchronization Anomaly Detected in the Secondary Data Processing Cluster [Node-74X-Beta]
notification.body:
A significant latency mismatch has been identified during the hourly backup sequence initiated at 04:00 AM. This discrepancy exceeds the established 500ms safety threshold by approximately 1,200ms. Our automated recovery protocols are currently attempting to re-establish a handshake with the primary cloud storage gateway. 

No immediate action is required from your end, but please maintain a stable network connection as the system attempts to re-index the local cache to prevent permanent data fragmentation. A full diagnostic report will be available in the 'Maintenance' tab of your dashboard once the synchronization reaches 100% completion. Estimated time remaining: 14 minutes and 22 seconds.
